revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[沖縄県]][[南城市]]にある建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:なんしようし}} Category:沖縄県の建築物 (...」

This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Sefa-utaki]].

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[沖縄県]][[南城市]]にある建築物に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:なんしようし}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|なんしようし}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:南城市の建築物|version=63928859}} {{translated page|ja|南城市の建築物|2=Category:南城市の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Buildings in Okinawa Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Nanjō, Okinawa]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:南城市の建築物]] [[ko:Category:난조시의 건축물]] [[sn:Category:Architecture of Nanjo City]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sefa-utaki]] [[zh:Category:南城市建築物]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q29900794)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q29900794)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{デフォルトソート:なんしようし}} {{座標一覧}} {{citation needed|なんしようし}} {{translated page|ja|Category:南城市の建築物|version=63928859}} {{translated page|ja|南城市の建築物|2=Category:南城市の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{wikidata link|Q29900794}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:南城市の建築物]] [[ko:Category:난조시의 건축물]] [[zh:Category:南城市建築物]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTCategory:Architecture of Nanjo City]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sefa-utaki]] [[Category:Buildings in Okinawa Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Nanjō, Okinawa]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]
